title: DCG implementation gaps remediation
description: Address all gaps found during plan completion signoff. 3 Complete, 11 Partial, 6 Not Implemented out of 20 docs. Major systemic issues: parser-matcher integration gap (ExtractedCommand unused by eval), no builder DSL, no safe-pattern evaluation, missing envdetect package, no Aho-Corasick pre-filter, pack subdirectory structure absent, and 5 pack categories entirely unimplemented (03c infra/cloud, 03d containers/k8s, 03e other, 03f personal, 03g macOS).
